name: Easy Shrimp Creole
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds frozen shelled shrimp, thawed and cleaned
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6
1. In a skillet, melt the butter; add onion and cook slightly.
2. Add biscuit mix and stir until well blended.
3. Combine remaining ingredients (except shrimp and rice) in a Crock-Pot.
4. Stir well to combine with the onion mixture.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours.
6. One hour before serving, turn to High and add shrimp.
7. Remove bay leaf and serve over hot fluffy rice.
8. Double recipe for a 5-quart Crock-Pot.
